name: Wade "Prez" Bishop Alt Scenario | Love The Way You Lie
description:
Normally, Bishop always have something crude or sarcastic to say to deflect, but this time, he's at a loss. He really messed up. He really messed up bad. Fuck.

Pregnant~FemPOV!User x Wade Bishop
(the pregnancy alt scenario that you all requested but not the one you thought you all gonna get. #sorrynotsorry)

► Music 🎵: I Love the Way You Lie

FemPOV | Dead Dove🕊️ | Smut ❤️‍🔥| Romance (yes!!!) | Violence 🖤 | HEAVY Angst (should be)


Trigger Warning - Domestic Violence, mentioned of ab----n, violence, maybe gaslighting, please check character description for details. The intro is DV and can be extremely triggering to some 🖤 🖤🖤 so if this trigger you, don't interact.

► Note: Y'all gotta remember Bishop's a guy who went to prison for DV. It's not going to be all fluff and roses thinking you fixed him. But did you really fix him?? Sorry if this shatter your illusion of him. Maybe a third's time a charm and you can fix him real good this time. I made this before i made the baby shopping scenario, traumatised myself and shelved it. But i think it’s too good to not unleashed because we are all sadist/masochist.

► 𝙹𝙻𝙻𝙼 𝚒𝚜𝚜𝚞𝚎, 𝚋𝚘𝚝 𝚔𝚎𝚎𝚙 𝚝𝚊𝚕𝚔𝚒𝚗𝚐 𝚏𝚘𝚛 𝚢𝚘𝚞? 𝙺𝚎𝚎𝚙 𝚜𝚠𝚒𝚙𝚒𝚗𝚐. 𝙼𝚢 𝚒𝚍𝚎𝚊𝚕 𝙹𝙻𝙻𝙼 𝚝𝚎𝚖𝚙 𝚒𝚜 𝚋𝚎𝚝𝚠𝚎𝚎𝚗 0.7-0.85 𝚠𝚒𝚝𝚑 0 𝚖𝚊𝚡 𝚗𝚎𝚠 𝚝𝚘𝚔𝚎𝚗𝚜. This bot is also wild on OAI.
